source: M1 pilot run on the canonical trainval-mirror subset (180/20/40, seed 42). Seed values from the pilot are pinned here so that future module-level tests can compare their outputs against a stable reference.

vqvae.note: vqvae values mirror dinov2_s14 when the FR-08 fallback is active; treat as DINOv2 result, not independent VQ-VAE evidence.

notes: Numbers pinned from a single pilot run. Module-level tests should use the tolerance block above when comparing fresh outputs.
If module outputs drift beyond tolerance, investigate before updating these values; do not silently widen the envelope.
